code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line_opt = io.read_line()
  let line = match line_opt
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end

  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  mut first = true

  while i < parts.len()
    if i % 2 == 0
      let val = match parts.get(i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        ""
      end
      if first
        result = val
        first = false
      else
        result = "#{result} #{val}"
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  println(result)
  Ok(())
end
